title: Better Farming ++
description: Better Farming is a lightweight and easy-to-use mod that enhances farming in Minecraft by introducing crop automation and quality-of-life features for growers of all experience levels
body:
![BisectHosting Partner][bisect-banner] **Need a server? → [Click here][bisect-link]**


![Ingame farming](https://i.imgur.com/n0GwEse.gif)

**Better Farming** is a lightweight Minecraft mod that enhances how you grow and manage crops. Whether you're automating your farm or just want more control over your harvests, this mod makes farming easier, faster, and more enjoyable.

--- ## **Features** - **Farmer Crate** – Automatically collects ready-to-harvest crops from nearby farmland. Perfect for automating your farms! - **Harvest Indicators** – All vanilla crops now show a visual indicator when they are ready to be harvested. - **Right-Click Harvesting** – Use whitelisted hoes to instantly harvest crops by right-clicking. - **Farmland Trampling Protection** – Prevent accidental trampling of your farmland when holding a hoe. - **Customizable Configs** – Easily whitelist hoes and toggle features through the `betterfarming/global` configuration file. ---

- ⏩ Compatible with **Minecraft 1.16.5, 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.5, 1.21.8** - ⏩ Requires **NeoForge or Forge** - ⏩ Requires **JAUMl Library**
